events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete — this is a **fail**. NM cable run within 1¼ in. of a stud face without a nail/screw plate violates NEC 300.4(D), which requires either that 1¼ in. setback or a minimum 1/16 in. steel protective plate. It's a correctable rough-in defect (reroute or install plates) but must be fixed before the walls are closed in. Details written to `/app/answer.json`.
